Question: Match the term with its definition or example
Answer:
1) Electric current - a) Flow of electric charge
2) Conductor - b) Material that allows current to pass through (copper, aluminium)
3) Insulator - c) Material that resists current flow (rubber, plastic)
4) Circuit - d) Closed path for electric current
5) Battery - e) Source of electric energy
6) Bulb - f) Device that converts electrical energy to light
7) Switch - g) Device to control flow of current
8) Voltmeter - h) Measures potential difference (voltage)
9) Ammeter - i) Measures current
10) Series circuit - j) Current flows through one path only
11) Parallel circuit - k) Current splits into multiple paths
12) Fuse - l) Protects circuit from excessive current
13) Electric shock - m) Injury caused by current passing through body
14) Short circuit - n) Unintended low-resistance connection causing excess current
15) Resistor - o) Component that resists flow of current
